hero.title: Feline Elegance
hero.subtitle: Authentic
hero.description: Preserving the majesty and gentle temperament of the original Siberian cat.

adoptionPage.title: Adoption Conditions
adoptionPage.intro: Below you can find our adoption rules. The full translation is being refined and structured section by section.

sections.title: Translation in progress
paragraphs: The complete content is currently available in Italian and will be translated into English soon.
You can still browse this page structure and we can add the full English version section by section.

contactPage.title: Reservation
contactPage.subtitle: Pre-adoption form
contactPage.intro: Fill out this form to help us understand your needs and guide you toward the most suitable kitten.
contactPage.thanks: Thank you for your interest in Imperial Line. After submitting the form we will contact you within 24 hours by email or using your preferred contact method.

fields.name: Full name*
fields.genderPreference: Would you prefer a female or a male kitten?*
fields.specificKitten: Are you interested in a specific kitten? *optional
fields.futureLitter: Would you like to reserve a kitten from an upcoming litter? *optional
fields.colorPreference: If yes, do you have a color preference? *optional

options.wantCat: No, but I would like to have a cat

availableKittensPage.title: Available Kittens
availableKittensPage.intro: Here you can view currently available kittens and the history of past or planned litters.
availableKittensPage.emptyAvailable: There are currently no available kittens.
availableKittensPage.emptyPlanned: No planned litters at the moment.
